title: ThreeTierKnowledgeRecallContracts
$comment: Mirrors the specbase entries/links schema (packages/lib/src/schema.ts) as reused for the separate events.sqlite store, plus the new event-source ingestion options and event query result shape. Authoritative shapes live in the specbase repo; this document is for contract tests and review.

eventEntry.$comment: An event-log markdown file projected into the reused entries schema, with type='event'.

title.$comment: First H1 or frontmatter summary, falling back to slug.

status.$comment: From new-event frontmatter (DD-9); null for legacy files.

created.$comment: ISO date parsed from filename (YYYYMMDD or YYYY-MM-DD); null when filename has no parseable date.

source_path.$comment: Relative path under docs/events or plans/**/events.

body_md.$comment: Whole file body, indexed into events_fts. body_html is NOT generated for events.

eventSourceOptions.$comment: New IndexOptions extension to point the reused indexer at flat event files and a separate DB.

eventSearchHit.$comment: Return row of event_search (BM25), mirrors specbase SearchHit.

rank.$comment: bm25() score; lower is more relevant.

eventQueryDsl.$comment: event_query filter tokens; date range derived from filename-date.

tierRoute.$comment: Output of the three-tier routing rule.

newEventFrontmatter.$comment: DD-9 minimal convention for NEW events only; old files exempt.
